option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Add Directory Provisioning Support for Google Workspace Connections
## Description
This PR adds comprehensive support for managing directory provisioning (directory sync) configurations for Google Workspace Enterprise connections in Auth0. This enables automatic user provisioning from Google Workspace to Auth0.
## Changes
### FEATURES
- **`resource/auth0_connection_directory`** – Add support for creating and managing directory provisioning configurations for Google Workspace connections - Configure custom attribute mappings between Auth0 and Google Workspace user fields - Enable/disable automatic periodic synchronization - Track synchronization status, timestamp, and errors - Full CRUD operations with import support
- **`data-source/auth0_connection_directory`** – Add support for retrieving existing directory provisioning configurations - Query configuration by connection ID - Access all configuration details including sync history
- **`data-source/auth0_connection_directory_default_mapping`** – Add support for retrieving default attribute mappings - Discover standard mappings provided by Auth0 for connection types - Use as reference for creating custom mappings - No need to create a resource first
### Implementation Details
#### Resources & Data Sources (3 new) 1. `auth0_connection_directory` (resource) - Main directory provisioning resource 2. `auth0_connection_directory` (data source) - Query existing configurations 3. `auth0_connection_directory_default_mapping` (data source) - Retrieve default mappings
#### Core Functions - **Expand Functions** (3 added to `expand.go`): - `expandDirectoryMapping()` - Converts Terraform schema to API format - `expandDirectory()` - Creates request payload with smart nil handling - `expandDirectoryUpdate()` - Updates request with empty array support for clearing mappings
- **Flatten Functions** (2 added to `flatten.go`): - `flattenDirectoryMappings()` - Converts API response to Terraform schema - `flattenDirectory()` - Flattens complete directory provisioning response
#### API Endpoints Used All endpoints use Auth0 Management API v2: - `POST /api/v2/connections/{id}/directory-provisioning` - Create configuration - `GET /api/v2/connections/{id}/directory-provisioning` - Read configuration - `PATCH /api/v2/connections/{id}/directory-provisioning` - Update configuration - `DELETE /api/v2/connections/{id}/directory-provisioning` - Delete configuration (disables sync) - `GET /api/v2/connections/{id}/directory-provisioning/default-mapping` - Get default mappings
### Schema
#### `auth0_connection_directory` (Resource)
**Required:** - `connection_id` (String) - ID of the connection (ForceNew)
**Optional:** - `mapping` (Set of Objects) - Attribute mappings - `auth0` (String, Required) - Auth0 field location - `idp` (String, Required) - IDP field location - `synchronize_automatically` (Boolean) - Enable automatic sync
**Computed:** - `connection_name` (String) - `strategy` (String) - `created_at` (String) - `updated_at` (String) - `last_synchronization_at` (String) - `last_synchronization_status` (String) - `last_synchronization_error` (String)
### Usage Examples
#### Basic Configuration ```hcl resource "auth0_connection_directory" "google_workspace" { connection_id = auth0_connection.google_workspace.id } ```
#### Custom Mapping with Auto-Sync ```hcl resource "auth0_connection_directory" "custom" { connection_id = auth0_connection.google_workspace.id synchronize_automatically = true
mapping { auth0 = "email" idp = "primaryEmail" }
mapping { auth0 = "name" idp = "name.fullName" }
mapping { auth0 = "family_name" idp = "name.familyName" }
mapping { auth0 = "given_name" idp = "name.givenName" } } ```
#### Using Default Mapping ```hcl data "auth0_connection_directory_default_mapping" "defaults" { connection_id = auth0_connection.google_workspace.id }
resource "auth0_connection_directory" "from_defaults" { connection_id = auth0_connection.google_workspace.id synchronize_automatically = true
dynamic "mapping" { for_each = data.auth0_connection_directory_default_mapping.defaults.mapping content { auth0 = mapping.value.auth0 idp = mapping.value.idp } } } ```
#### Query Existing Configuration ```hcl data "auth0_connection_directory" "existing" { connection_id = "con_XXXXX" }
output "sync_status" { value = data.auth0_connection_directory.existing.last_synchronization_status } ```
#### Import ```bash terraform import auth0_connection_directory.example con_XXXXX ```
### Key Features
1. **Smart Nil Handling** - Expand functions return `nil` when no meaningful data is provided, preventing empty API requests 2. **Empty Array Support** - Update operations can send empty array `[]` to clear all mappings 3. **Full Import Support** - Resources can be imported using connection ID 4. **Sync Status Tracking** - Track last sync timestamp, status, and error messages 5. **Default Mapping Discovery** - Retrieve standard mappings without creating resources 6. **Type Safety** - Uses Auth0 Management API v2 SDK with proper type definitions
### Testing
#### Test Files Created - `resource_directory_test.go` - Resource CRUD operations, import, mapping updates - `data_source_directory_test.go` - Data source read operations - `data_source_directory_default_mapping_test.go` - Default mapping retrieval
#### Test Coverage - ✅ Non-existent resource error handling - ✅ Default configuration creation - ✅ Custom mapping configuration - ✅ Mapping updates (add, modify, remove) - ✅ Import functionality - ✅ Data source reads - ✅ Default mapping retrieval
### Documentation
#### Examples Added - `examples/resources/auth0_connection_directory/resource.tf` - `examples/resources/auth0_connection_directory/import.sh` - `examples/data-sources/auth0_connection_directory/data-source.tf` - `examples/data-sources/auth0_connection_directory_default_mapping/data-source.tf`
### Bug Fixes
- **Validation Error Fix** - Removed `ValidateFunc` from computed-only fields in default mapping data source to prevent internal validation errors
### Breaking Changes
None - This is a new feature addition.
### Dependencies
- Requires Auth0 Management API v2 SDK (already in vendor) - Uses `github.com/auth0/go-auth0/v2/management` types
### Scopes Required
The following Auth0 Management API scopes are required: - `create:directory_provisionings` - `read:directory_provisionings` - `update:directory_provisionings` - `delete:directory_provisionings`
### Limitations
- Only works with Google Workspace Enterprise connections (`google-apps` strategy) - Deleting the resource disables directory sync for the connection - Mapping defaults to connection type's default if not specified
### Files Changed
#### Implementation (6 files) - `internal/auth0/connection/resource_directory.go` (**new**) - `internal/auth0/connection/data_source_directory.go` (**new**) - `internal/auth0/connection/data_source_directory_default_mapping.go` (**new**) - `internal/auth0/connection/expand.go` (modified - added 3 functions) - `internal/auth0/connection/flatten.go` (modified - added 2 functions) - `internal/provider/provider.go` (modified - registered resources)
#### Tests (3 files) - `internal/auth0/connection/resource_directory_test.go` (**new**) - `internal/auth0/connection/data_source_directory_test.go` (**new**) - `internal/auth0/connection/data_source_directory_default_mapping_test.go` (**new**)
#### Examples (4 files) - `examples/resources/auth0_connection_directory/resource.tf` (**new**) - `examples/resources/auth0_connection_directory/import.sh` (**new**) - `examples/data-sources/auth0_connection_directory/data-source.tf` (**new**) - `examples/data-sources/auth0_connection_directory_default_mapping/data-source.tf` (**new**)
### Checklist
- [x] New resources/data sources implemented - [x] Tests added and passing - [x] Examples created - [x] No compilation errors - [x] No validation errors - [x] Follows existing code patterns (similar to SCIM configuration) - [x] Import support implemented - [x] Error handling implemented - [ ] Documentation generated with `make docs` - [ ] Acceptance tests run with Auth0 credentials - [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
### Related Issues
Implements directory provisioning support as specified in Auth0 Management API v2 specification.
### Notes
This implementation follows the same patterns as the existing `auth0_connection_scim_configuration` resource, ensuring consistency across connection-related resources. The smart nil handling and empty array support provide flexible configuration management for users.

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent

originalContent
updatedContent
